messages.content: Ice Age DVD USA date Released
The Ice Age DVD was released in the USA on November 3, 2002.
Ice Age DVD USA Released date
The Ice Age DVD was released in the USA on March 4, 2002.
Ice Age USA DVD  Release date
The Ice Age DVD was released in the USA on March 26, 2002.
Ice Age USA DVD Released date
Apologies for the confusion. The Ice Age DVD was actually released in the USA on November 26, 2002.
Ice Age USA Blu-ray Released date
The Ice Age Blu-ray was released in the USA on March 4, 2008.
Ice Age 3 USA Blu-ray Released date
Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs (Ice Age 3) was released on Blu-ray in the USA on October 27, 2009.
Ice Age 4 USA Blu-ray Released date
Ice Age: Continental Drift (Ice Age 4) was released on Blu-ray in the USA on December 11, 2012.
Ice Age 5 USA Blu-ray Released date
Ice Age: Collision Course (Ice Age 5) was released on Blu-ray in the USA on October 11, 2016.
Ice Age 2 USA Blu-ray Released date
Ice Age: The Meltdown (Ice Age 2) was released on Blu-ray in the USA on November 21, 2006.
Rio USA Blu-ray Released date
Rio was released on Blu-ray in the USA on August 2, 2011.
Rio UK Blu-ray Released date
Rio was released on Blu-ray in the UK on August 15, 2011.
